prompt: Create a candid 35mm film-style lifestyle photo of a young woman at a retro American diner during golden hour. She is sitting casually on the hood of a cream-colored vintage station wagon with wood paneling, parked directly outside the diner. The woman has long dark brown wavy hair, olive-toned skin, thick eyebrows, and a relaxed, slightly smiling expression while looking off to the side rather than at the camera. She wears a navy varsity jacket with white striped cuffs, a light ribbed tank top, high-waisted loose blue jeans, white socks with stripes, and black-and-white sneakers. She holds a tall pale milkshake with whipped cream and a red-and-white striped straw near her mouth. On the car hood beside her is exactly 1 red plastic diner basket lined with paper, containing fries or snacks, plus exactly 1 small paper cup. The background shows a busy old-fashioned diner strip with neon signs and warm signage, including visible diner-themed words like “EAT,” “FRIES,” “DINER,” and a Coca-Cola sign; include large windows with seated customers inside, chrome trim, parked cars, string lights overhead, and a sunset sky. Use warm backlighting, soft haze, natural film grain, muted nostalgic colors, slight lens softness, realistic skin texture, and an unposed documentary feel. Frame vertically in a 2:3 portrait composition, with the woman centered on the car hood and the diner storefront filling the upper left background. Avoid a polished fashion-shoot look, avoid modern cars dominating the scene, and do not add extra text beyond plausible diner signage.
promptEn: Create a candid 35mm film-style lifestyle photo of a young woman at a retro American diner during golden hour. She is sitting casually on the hood of a cream-colored vintage station wagon with wood paneling, parked directly outside the diner. The woman has long dark brown wavy hair, olive-toned skin, thick eyebrows, and a relaxed, slightly smiling expression while looking off to the side rather than at the camera. She wears a navy varsity jacket with white striped cuffs, a light ribbed tank top, high-waisted loose blue jeans, white socks with stripes, and black-and-white sneakers. She holds a tall pale milkshake with whipped cream and a red-and-white striped straw near her mouth. On the car hood beside her is exactly 1 red plastic diner basket lined with paper, containing fries or snacks, plus exactly 1 small paper cup. The background shows a busy old-fashioned diner strip with neon signs and warm signage, including visible diner-themed words like “EAT,” “FRIES,” “DINER,” and a Coca-Cola sign; include large windows with seated customers inside, chrome trim, parked cars, string lights overhead, and a sunset sky. Use warm backlighting, soft haze, natural film grain, muted nostalgic colors, slight lens softness, realistic skin texture, and an unposed documentary feel. Frame vertically in a 2:3 portrait composition, with the woman centered on the car hood and the diner storefront filling the upper left background. Avoid a polished fashion-shoot look, avoid modern cars dominating the scene, and do not add extra text beyond plausible diner signage.
promptZh: 创作一张 35mm 胶片风格的抓拍生活照，展现一位年轻女性在黄金时刻身处复古美式餐厅的场景。她随意地坐在停在餐厅外一辆奶油色木纹复古旅行车的引擎盖上。这位女性拥有 一头深棕色长波浪卷发、橄榄色皮肤、浓密的眉毛，表情轻松且带着一丝微笑，视线看向侧方而非镜头。她穿着 一件带有白色条纹袖口的深蓝色棒球夹克、浅色罗纹背心、高腰宽松牛仔裤、条纹白袜以及黑白运动鞋。她手中拿着一杯插着红白条纹吸管、顶部有奶油的浅色奶昔，靠近嘴边。车引擎盖上放着 1 个铺着衬纸的红色塑料餐厅篮，里面装着薯条或零食，旁边还有 1 个小纸杯。背景是繁忙的老式餐厅街区，带有霓虹灯和暖色调招牌，可见“EAT”、“FRIES”、“DINER”等餐厅主题词汇以及可口可乐标志；背景中还包括带有室内顾客的大窗户、镀铬装饰、停放的车辆、头顶的串灯以及落日余晖。使用温暖的逆光、柔和的雾感、自然的胶片颗粒、低饱和度的怀旧色彩、轻微的镜头柔焦、真实的皮肤纹理，营造出一种非摆拍的纪实感。采用 2:3 的竖构图，女性位于车引擎盖中心，餐厅店面填充左上方背景。避免过于精致的时尚大片感，避免现代车辆占据画面，除合理的餐厅招牌外，请勿添加额外文字。
